name: Baked French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly coat a 9" x 13" x 2-inch pan with non-stick vegetable spray.
2. Arrange bread slices in the bottom of the pan.
3. In a bowl, combine all remaining ingredients and mix well using a whisk or egg beater.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the bread.
5. Cover tightly and refrigerate several hours or overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
7. Remove the bread from the refrigerator and spray lightly with non-stick vegetable spray.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes, until lightly browned.
9. Serve with hot maple syrup, powdered sugar, and cinnamon.
Sylvia's notes: This worked fine, coming out reasonably crisp on the outside and reasonably soggy on the inside. Definitely a fine lower-fat alternative to traditional fried French toast.
